heading: View Third-Party Integrations
body:
To list all third-party integrations for a project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas integrations list [options]

```To return the details for one third-party integration using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas integrations describe <integrationType> [options]

```To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas integrations list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-list) and
[atlas integrations describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-integrations-describe).Related Links* [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

* [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)
